name: infamous-freight
description: Infamous Freight — The freight dispatch platform built by truckers, for truckers

scripts.build: pnpm run build:api && pnpm run build:web
scripts.lint: node scripts/ensure-api-workspace.js && pnpm --filter @infamous-freight/api run lint && pnpm --filter @infamous-freight/web run lint
scripts.prisma:generate: node scripts/ensure-api-workspace.js && pnpm --filter @infamous-freight/api exec prisma generate
scripts.prisma:migrate: node scripts/ensure-api-workspace.js && pnpm --filter @infamous-freight/api exec prisma migrate dev
scripts.prisma:seed: node scripts/ensure-api-workspace.js && pnpm --filter @infamous-freight/api exec prisma db seed
scripts.db:setup: pnpm run prisma:generate && pnpm run prisma:migrate && pnpm run prisma:seed
